meta.title: Lattix
navbar.slogan: Distributed agent orchestration, without a control plane.
home.agentHint: Leave empty to use each node's default agent configuration.
home.nodesEmpty: No nodes have executed tasks yet. Run npx -y lattix run on a machine to enroll it.
home.recentTasksEmpty: No tasks yet. Use the form above to submit your first task.
home.recentTasksFailed: Failed to load tasks. Please try again.
home.loadFailed: Failed to load task details. Please try again.
home.welcomeText: No Lattix workspace found in your OneDrive. Get started by installing Lattix on your first machine:
home.welcomeExplanation: This will create the Lattix workspace in your OneDrive and start watching for tasks.
home.welcomeHint: 💡 Make sure you signed in with the same Microsoft account used by your machines' OneDrive.
taskList.title: All Tasks
taskList.empty: No tasks found. Submit a task from the Home page.
taskList.loadFailed: Failed to load tasks. Please try again.
taskDetail.noResults: No results yet. Machines may still be processing this task.
settings.title: Settings
settings.agentDesc: Set the default agent command used when submitting tasks from this dashboard. Each node can override this with its own local configuration.
settings.aboutDesc: Lattix Web Dashboard connects to your OneDrive via Microsoft Graph API to manage tasks and monitor nodes controlled by the Lattix CLI.
settings.aboutSecurity: Lattix requires no tunnels, no exposed ports, and moves no data. All coordination happens through your existing OneDrive sync — nothing additional to audit, secure, or maintain.
